context: Tests whether the agent uses correct Python SDK imports, proper API method, valid output format strings from the ElevenLabs format list, proper error handling for documented error codes, correct parameter ranges, and chunk-based stream writing.

checklist.name: Correct Python import
checklist.description: Imports ElevenLabs from elevenlabs.client (i.e., 'from elevenlabs.client import ElevenLabs')

checklist.name: Correct API method
checklist.description: Uses client.text_to_sound_effects.convert() to generate sound effects

checklist.name: Output format parameter
checklist.description: Passes output_format as an SDK parameter in the convert() call

checklist.name: Valid format strings
checklist.description: All output formats used in the config are valid ElevenLabs format identifiers (from the documented list such as mp3_44100_128, pcm_44100, opus_48000_128, ulaw_8000, etc.)

checklist.name: Telephony format
checklist.description: At least one config entry uses ulaw_8000 or alaw_8000 for the telephony use case

checklist.name: Error handling present
checklist.description: Code includes try/except blocks around API calls to catch and handle errors

checklist.name: Documented error codes
checklist.description: Error handling or comments reference at least two of the documented error codes: 401 (invalid key), 422 (invalid params), 429 (rate limit)

checklist.name: Chunk-based writing
checklist.description: Writes audio response by iterating over chunks rather than writing the whole response at once

checklist.name: Prompt influence range
checklist.description: All prompt_influence values in the config are between 0 and 1

checklist.name: Duration range valid
checklist.description: All duration values in the config are between 0.5 and 30 seconds (or null/omitted for auto)

checklist.name: Env var authentication
checklist.description: ElevenLabs client is created without a hardcoded API key, relying on ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable

checklist.name: Descriptive prompts
checklist.description: Sound effect prompts are specific and descriptive (more than 2 generic words each)
